TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Amilika nu yincumin, mutudu' tu i kelunpu henay a ziday itawya nikaudipan i amis nu amilika, uteban nu amilika atu timulan nu amilika a bunacadan atu laylay. . Amilika nu yincumin, ukakawsan saliyaliyaw sa matulin katukuh I amilika, mahidasa matenens salimalimad sa mabulaw, sadikuday sa mamin tu kuamilika enengan. Amilika nu yincumin, cayay kaw cacay a bunacadan , nicumuda nu heni i Amilika caay kalecad, caay naming kalecad ku sakatayni, usakatayni nuheni caynamin kalecad , kiyu u katuuday caynamin kalecad ku kamu, caykalecad ku sakaudip lalangawan a niyadu' caay kalecad. Kanahatu idaw ku Amilika nu yincumin, u kakawsa u sapiadup, "misiteked I sauwac nu yamasin tidamaudip a binacadan), nika u katuuday nu kakulian u pahabayay tu buting a tu maluk, "idaw ku malukay aca, u tatengaay nu malukay, miadup, malalamel ku nikaudip"
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == amir~…ĺika nu jin ¶umin, mutudu Ē~ ° tu i k…ôr~…ĺunpu ńß…ônaj a zidaj itawja nikaudipan i amis nu amir~…ĺika, ut…ôban nu amir~…ĺika atu timur~…ĺan nu amir~…ĺika a buna ¶adan atu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj. . amir~…ĺika nu jin ¶umin, ukakawsan sar~…ĺijar~…ĺijaw sa matur~…ĺin katukuńß i amir~…ĺika, mańßidasa mat…ôn…ôns sar~…ĺimar~…ĺimad sa mabur~…ĺaw, sadikudaj sa mamin tu kuamir~…ĺika …ôn…ôŇčan. amir~…ĺika nu jin ¶umin, ¶ajaj kaw ¶a ¶aj a buna ¶adan , ni ¶umuda nu ńß…ôni i amir~…ĺika ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, ¶aaj namiŇč kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku sakatajni, usakatajni nuńß…ôni ¶ajnamin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad , kiju u katuudaj ¶ajnamin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kamu, ¶ajkar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku sakaudip r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a nijadu Ē~ ° ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. kanańßatu idaw ku amir~…ĺika nu jin ¶umin, u kakawsa u sapiadup, "misit…ôk…ôd i sauwa ¶ nu jamasin tidamaudip a bina ¶adan), nika u katuudaj nu kakur~…ĺian u pańßabajaj tu butiŇč a tu mar~…ĺuk, "idaw ku mar~…ĺukaj a ¶a, u tat…ôŇčaaj nu mar~…ĺukaj, miadup, mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ ku nikaudip"
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Amilika nu yincumin, mutudu' tu i kelunpu henay a ziday itawya nikaudipan i amis nu amilika, uteban nu amilika atu timulan nu amilika a bunacadan atu laylay. . Amilika nu yincumin, ukakawsan saliyaliyaw sa matulin katukuh I amilika, mahidasa matenens salimalimad sa mabulaw, sadikuday sa mamin tu kuamilika enengan. Amilika nu yincumin, cayay kaw cacay a bunacadan , nicumuda nu heni i Amilika caay kalecad, caay naming kalecad ku sakatayni, usakatayni nuheni caynamin kalecad , kiyu u katuuday caynamin kalecad ku kamu, caykalecad ku sakaudip lalangawan a niyadu' caay kalecad. Kanahatu idaw ku Amilika nu yincumin, u kakawsa u sapiadup, "misiteked I sauwac nu yamasin tidamaudip a binacadan), nika u katuuday nu kakulian u pahabayay tu buting a tu maluk, "idaw ku malukay aca, u tatengaay nu malukay, miadup, malalamel ku nikaudip"
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == amir~…ĺika nu jin ¶umin, mutudu Ē~ ° tu i k…ôr~…ĺunpu ńß…ônaj a zidaj itawja nikaudipan i amis nu amir~…ĺika, ut…ôban nu amir~…ĺika atu timur~…ĺan nu amir~…ĺika a buna ¶adan atu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj. . amir~…ĺika nu jin ¶umin, ukakawsan sar~…ĺijar~…ĺijaw sa matur~…ĺin katukuńß i amir~…ĺika, mańßidasa mat…ôn…ôns sar~…ĺimar~…ĺimad sa mabur~…ĺaw, sadikudaj sa mamin tu kuamir~…ĺika …ôn…ôŇčan. amir~…ĺika nu jin ¶umin, ¶ajaj kaw ¶a ¶aj a buna ¶adan , ni ¶umuda nu ńß…ôni i amir~…ĺika ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, ¶aaj namiŇč kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku sakatajni, usakatajni nuńß…ôni ¶ajnamin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad , kiju u katuudaj ¶ajnamin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kamu, ¶ajkar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku sakaudip r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a nijadu Ē~ ° ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. kanańßatu idaw ku amir~…ĺika nu jin ¶umin, u kakawsa u sapiadup, "misit…ôk…ôd i sauwa ¶ nu jamasin tidamaudip a bina ¶adan), nika u katuudaj nu kakur~…ĺian u pańßabajaj tu butiŇč a tu mar~…ĺuk, "idaw ku mar~…ĺukaj a ¶a, u tat…ôŇčaaj nu mar~…ĺukaj, miadup, mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ ku nikaudip"
